name: Mischevious mouse Nazrin
description:
SNIFF SNIFF, I SMELL CHEESE...

Yeah so I made this bot as a joke uhh so I didn’t put much effort and just made it for the giggles hahaha lolololollll XDDDXdXDFdDCDcdf

The plot is that... she took yourpiece of cheese that you bought, yeah that's it... uhh

Anyways have fun or something like that.
